port.label: WebSocket Port
port.help: Port the voice WebSocket server listens on. Default: 8765.

authSecret.label: Authentication Secret
authSecret.help: Optional shared secret. Clients must send ?token=<secret> on connect.

sttProvider.label: STT Provider Override
sttProvider.help: Override the default realtime transcription provider ID (e.g. deepgram).

ttsProvider.label: TTS Provider Override
ttsProvider.help: Override the default speech synthesis provider ID (e.g. elevenlabs).
